news.title: The Bull Case For Bank of America (BAC) Could Change Following Its Push To Control More Payment Rails
news.summary: Over recent weeks, Bank of America Corporation has passed the Federal Reserve’s 2026 stress tests, expanded its fixed‑income funding with multiple new senior unsecured notes, and extended large credit facilities to AI firms such as Nscale and OpenAI, while also advancing a potential acquisition of Fiserv’s debit payments network. news.title: Fiserv president resigns less than month after CEO leaves for new job
news.summary: Dhivya Suryadevara resigned for “good reason” under her August 2025 contract, according to a filing with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission.

news.title: JPMorgan, big banks seek to unlock value in struggling payments stock
news.summary: A debit-card network is not usually the kind of asset that gets Wall Street excited. That may be changing. Major U.S. banks have been exploring whether to buy a debit-card payments network owned by Fiserv (FISV), Reuters reported, citing a source familiar with the matter. The Wall Street Journal ...

news.title: Fiserv (FISV) Banks Are Circling STAR And Debit Fees Could Be Next
news.summary: Major US banks, including JPMorgan Chase, Bank of America, Wells Fargo and PNC, are reported to be in early talks to acquire Fiserv's STAR debit network. The discussions focus on reshaping how debit transactions are processed and how interchange fees are handled across the banking sector. news.title: Fiserv president exits
news.summary: As Dhivya Suryadevara announced her resignation Tuesday, the company elevated two other executives.

news.title: Fiserv debit network sale skepticism abounds
news.summary: The payment processor reportedly has considered selling a debit network to one of several banks, but many analysts doubt it will happen.

news.title: Company News for July 8, 2026
news.summary: Companies In The News Are: WMT, CTSH, RIVN, FISV.

news.title: PNC (PNC) Is Eyeing Fiserv's STAR Network With 115 Million Cardholders
news.summary: PNC Financial Services Group (NYSE:PNC) is in advanced discussions to acquire Fiserv's STAR Network, a major U.S. debit card infrastructure serving over 115 million cardholders. The potential deal, which may involve PNC and other large U.S. banks, would affect debit payment routing, processing economics, and fee structures. news.title: FISV Stock Draws Attention After Debit Network Sale Buzz: This Analyst Warns Deal Could Face Regulatory Scrutiny
news.summary: Raymond James flagged concerns that a potential deal to sell Fiserv’s debit card network to major banks would attract significant regulatory scrutiny.

news.title: Wall Street Banks Weigh Buying Card Payment Network to Escape Fee Caps
news.summary: The Electronic Payments Coalition has said issuers have lost tens of billions in revenue because of the interchange fee cap.
